aeo_readiness.summary: The website has minimal AEO readiness with a lack of structured data, limited content depth, and no visible Google Business Profile. The focus should be on foundational elements to improve search visibility.
quick_wins: Implement basic schema markup (e.g., LocalBusiness, Service) to provide search engines with structured data.
Create and verify a Google Business Profile to improve local search presence.
Enhance website content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Vets for You Plumbing. This is a critical issue as it significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of a verified Google Business Profile.
No customer reviews or engagement on GBP (due to absence).

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are partially consistent across the website but lack citations on external platforms.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across the website and all online directories.
List the business on relevant local directories and citation sites (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages).
Monitor and manage online citations to correct any inconsistencies.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and voice search queries
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement basic schema markup and create a Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as a local authority by generating customer reviews and publishing locally relevant content
